parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, status: 'duplicate', message: 'URL already exists in the knowledge base', url: $('Validate URL').first().json.url }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('Validate URL').first().json.url, formats: ['markdown'], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 45000 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, status: 'scrape_failed', message: $json.error, url: $json.url }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $json.content, filename: $json.filename, title: $json.title, url: $json.url, tags: $json.tags, category: $json.category, dataset_id: $json.dataset_id, auto_create_tags: true }) }}
